title: Perfect Shark requires Sharkling and Great White materials

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Can only be summoned by placing "Sharkling" and "Great White" on the field under this card. If this card leaves the field, changes control, or is killed, "Sharkling" and "Great White" follow it.

effect.value: Place Sharkling and Great White under this card on the field

plan.title: Perfect Shark requires Sharkling and Great White materials
plan.summary: Summon Perfect Shark by placing Sharkling and Great White under it and verify both materials attach under the source.

notes: Perfect Shark can only be summoned by placing Sharkling and Great White on the field under this card.

steps: Keep Perfect Shark, Sharkling, and Great White available to player_1.
Summon Perfect Shark using both required materials.
Verify both materials are attached under Perfect Shark.

expectedAssertions.label: Perfect Shark summon succeeds with both required materials
Sharkling is attached under Perfect Shark
Great White is attached under Perfect Shark
Sharkling is not sent to cemetery as a normal sacrifice
Great White is not sent to cemetery as a normal sacrifice

manualVerification: Missing either material should reject the summon.
riskNotes: This protects the two-material under-source requirement for Perfect Shark.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_021_perfect_shark-021-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
